name: Weak cryptographic hash (MD5/SHA-1)
description: crypto.createHash() is called with MD5 or SHA-1, which are cryptographically broken. Collision attacks against these algorithms are practical, making them unsuitable for integrity verification, signatures, or password hashing.
remediation: Replace MD5 and SHA-1 with SHA-256 or SHA-3 for integrity checks. For password hashing, use bcrypt, scrypt, or Argon2 instead of any raw hash function.

patterns.message_template: crypto.createHash("{{arg}}") uses a weak hash algorithm
